title: FIRE Calculator
monthlySavingsExplanation: Amount which gets added every month. To be on the safe side (to use a conservative estimate), the interim monthly returns of years are not included in calculations.
extraIncomeExplanation: All additional passive extra monthly (non-interest-bearing) incomes, if present.
expectedInterestExplanation: An average expected interest rate to calculate with.
expectedInflationExplanation: Expected average annual inflation rate for future years.
safeWithdrawalRateExplanation: A custom safe withdrawal rate to use for monthly income calculations.
saveExplanation: Save current calculation numbers to a locally stored profile.
exportExplanation: Save all locally saved profiles to a file.
importExplanation: Load new profiles from a previously saved file.
openingBalanceExplanation: Opening balance of the year according to previous year's calculations.
yearlySavingsExplanation: Total savings for this year, from monthly savings. Please note that interim return is not calculated for this amount, only for years after.
nominalReturnExplanation: A nominal return for this year, calculated for the opening balance only.
endYearMinimumExplanation: The calculated minimum balance for the end of this year, and its present value
fireMonthlyIncomeExplanation: A calculated monthly income according to the end-year minimum balance, and its present value
totalMonthlyIncomeExplanation: A calculated monthly income according to the end-year minimum balance (with extra monthly income added), and its present value
